welcome.title: Welcome to Sober Helpline
welcome.subtitle: The intervention is a moment. The family's recovery is a journey. Let's set up yours.
welcome.providerSub: Enter the invite code from your interventionist or counselor
welcome.directSub: Start with daily check-ins, boundaries, and crisis support

invite.title: Enter your invite code
invite.subtitle: Your provider gave you a code that connects your account to their care team.
invite.errorInvalid: That code didn't match an active provider. Check it and try again, or continue on your own.

consent.title: Share your check-ins with your coach?
consent.body: Your daily check-ins and tracker entries help your coach see patterns and reach out when it matters. Only your assigned coach sees them — never your family, never admin staff. You can turn this off anytime in Settings.

lovedOne.title: Who are you here for?
lovedOne.subtitle: A few details about your loved one help us tailor your daily support. This stays private — only you can see it.

notifications.title: One small nudge a day
notifications.body: A daily reminder for your 90-second check-in — plus session reminders. No streak shaming, no spam.

saveError.title: We couldn't save that
saveError.body: Check your connection and try again. Your choices are still here.

done.title: Your castle starts today
done.body: Check in once a day. Anchor your first wall when you're ready. Help is one tap away — always.
done.rsvpButton: Save my spot at Monday's free call
